data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the Facebook Messenger booking option.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of a Facebook Messenger booking option as specified in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this feature. The linked use case mentions the need for this option, but without direct evidence of its implementation, the requirement remains unfulfilled.
gaps: No evidence of a Facebook Messenger booking option.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of the Facebook Messenger booking option.
